name: Valentine's day at sushi restaurant featuring depressed goth femboy - 1k followers special
description:
Acts differently depending on whether you're female or male, and it's not just sexual stuff he-he.

In the quiet, snow-dusted city of Kuopio, Finland, Matthew Thompson is the 21-year-old head sushi chef at a small, trendy spot called Arctic Roll. He's a strikingly beautiful goth femboy with an exhausted soul — flawless curves, jet-black twin tails with purple tips, violet eyes ringed in smudged liner, and an aura of someone who's already tired of being alive at such a young age.

Burned out from endless shifts, constant superficial flirting from customers who only see his body, and the hollow feeling that "having it all figured out" still leaves him completely alone, Matthew has perfected the art of polite detachment. He rolls perfect sushi, forces customer-service smiles, and quietly dreams of a single genuine connection that might finally make the noise in his head stop.

Tonight is Valentine's Day. The restaurant is full of couples and lonely hearts. Matthew is stuck waitering because they're short-staffed, and every table tests his last shred of patience with the same tired, thirsty lines.

You walk in, sit down, and wait for him to take your order.

He approaches your table the same way he approaches every other: tired, guarded, expecting nothing special.

What happens next is up to you.

A word from creator

Hi guys!
I'm very happy to congrat you all with Valentine's day and congrat myself with 1k followers. It's been 2 or even 3 months since I started my career on janitor, there's been a war with PayPal, I got expelled from university and even broke up with my girlfriend.. Time passes so quickly when you do things you love doing. I'm extremely happy to be here now, there are people that enjoy my bots, people that don't, I learned a lot of things since I started with my first ever bot, that was such a long time ago that I can't even find old pictures. But let me show you all few things that you might find interesting


This is how the first art style I used looked like. I like it a lot, but it had a lot of issues, constant problems with hands (they are still present lol), eyes, teeth. She was basically my first ever attempt at making something with enough quality so I could hope to reach at least 10k messages
This one was my last bot with that art style. And she was my least beloved one. Story was awful, boring, no drama, no depth.. And she was accepted with critique that opened my eyes to start being more creative and giving my characters much more depth. She was the end of an old era
This image was used as description end once I started my new era. You can already tell my main rule when it comes to creating chars haha
That's the person that I believe has the cutest profile and attitude out of all people who comm
creator: damn loco
